calendar.matters:
ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-24-2019 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Disputed Claim Or Pending Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment For Minor Or Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Jun-13-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Pending Action of a Person with a Disability.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

Janine M. Fiel-Cosse, Esq. appeared with Eric Riggins, who was present via CourtCall as Guardian ad Litem for Claimant Lawrence Riggins, who was not present for this morning's proceedings.
Petitioner was placed under oath and testified.
Order appointing Eric Riggins Guardian ad Litem for Lawrence Riggins was filed on November 14, 2013.
Order to Apportion and Distribute Funds was filed with the Clerk's Office on December 28, 2017.
Order waiving witness appearance and permitting the Guardian ad Litem to appear via CourtCall was filed on May 23, 2019.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $12,965.33.
Attorney Fees - $4,227.81.
Costs - $1,953.06.

The net balance of $6,784.46 shall be deposited into Downton Emergency Service Center's Representative Payee Account Maintained for Lawrence Riggin's Social Security Disability Income.

Order Approving the Compromise of a Pending Action of a Person with a Disability was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ASBESTOS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2019 Continued To Aug-01-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503

Notice Of Motion For Order To Apportion And Distribute Funds
Off Calendar Dec-28-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Motion for an Order to Apportion and Distribute Settlement Funds.
Dept. 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Amir Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for plaintiffs Eric Riggins, as Wrongful Death Heir, and as Successor-in-Interest to and as Wrongful Death Heir of James Riggins, et al.
Eric Riggins, Jr., James Riggins and Gerald Riggins, Legal Heirs of James Riggins, Deceased, were present, placed under oath and testified.

The Court, having reviewed the moving papers and having considered the evidence, both oral and documentary, and good cause appearing, RULES that the following are entitled to distribution of all net funds from settlements negotiated after the June 28, 2012 death of James Riggins in the following proportions as follows:

Estate of James Riggins - 0%.
Erick Riggins - 25%.
James Riggins, Jr. - 25%.
Gerald Riggins - 25%.
Lawrence Riggins - 25%.

All future net funds derived from settlements entered after the June 28, 2012 death of James Riggins shall be distributed in the percentages set forth in paragraph 1 herein above.

The signature of plaintiff Eric Riggins alone is sufficient to bind the estate and wrongful death heirs on all settlement documents.

Order to Apportion and Distribute Funds was submitted to and signed by the Court.
